use_cases: Hero section background with animated wave effect for landing pages
Decorative background element for portfolio or creative websites
Loading state visualization with organic flowing animation
Interactive product showcase with pointer-reactive shader effects
Ambient visual component for streaming or media platforms
ai_summary: A 3D wave shader component built with React Three Fiber and custom GLSL shaders. Features time-based animation, pointer tracking, and a dynamic color palette that generates smooth gradient waves. The component renders a transparent centered plane with organic ripple effects, ideal for hero backgrounds or ambient visual decoration on modern web applications.
